description_long: This is a black, full-coverage helmet with a rounded dome and a matte, slightly scuffed surface, suggesting frequent use. The front displays a bold white serial number '008759', while the sides feature a large red blood type marking 'O+' in a stenciled style. The helmet includes a sturdy chin guard and a thick, padded neck protector at the rear, both appearing to be made from reinforced synthetic materials. A metallic frame or bar runs along the lower edge, likely for structural support or additional protection. The surface is marked with scratches and wear, indicating it is designed for rugged, urban environments. No visible brand logos or decorative motifs are present aside from the utilitarian markings.
description: A black, well-worn helmet with a white serial number on the front and a red 'O+' blood type marking on the sides, featuring a chin guard and padded neck protector.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white serial number '008759' and the rounded, scuffed dome.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large red 'O+' marking and the metallic frame along the lower edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded neck protector and the helmet's smooth, unmarked back surface.
description_view_3: Right side view again shows the red 'O+' marking and the continuation of the metallic frame.
attribute_graphic_design: Utilitarian with a white serial number on the front and large red 'O+' blood type markings on both sides; no decorative motifs.
